zh: 我喜欢苹果和橙子。
en: I like apples and oranges.

zh: 她又高又漂亮。
en: She is tall and beautiful.

zh: 他既聪明又勤奋。
en: He is both clever and hardworking.

zh: 不仅她，他也通过了考试。
en: Not only she but also he passed the exam.

zh: 她和他都喜欢音乐。
en: Both she and he like music.

zh: 他们既不喜欢足球，也不喜欢篮球。
en: They like neither football nor basketball.

zh: 你可以喝茶或咖啡。
en: You can have tea or coffee.

zh: 要么你去，要么我去。
en: Either you go or I go.

zh: 他很聪明，但他不努力。
en: He is clever but he does not work hard.

zh: 她很累，但她还是继续工作。
en: She was tired but she kept working.

zh: 因为下雨了，所以比赛取消了。
en: Because it rained, the game was cancelled.

zh: 她没有来，因为她生病了。
en: She did not come because she was ill.

zh: 既然你知道答案，就告诉我们吧。
en: Since you know the answer, tell us.

zh: 因为天气很好，我们决定去野餐。
en: As the weather was fine, we decided to have a picnic.

zh: 他努力学习，所以他通过了考试。
en: He studied hard, so he passed the exam.

zh: 虽然她很累，但她还是完成了工作。
en: Although she was tired, she finished the work.

zh: 尽管天气很冷，他们还是去了公园。
en: Though the weather was cold, they went to the park.

zh: 即使下雨，我们也会去。
en: Even if it rains, we will go.

zh: 如果你努力，你就会成功。
en: If you work hard, you will succeed.

zh: 除非你道歉，否则我不会原谅你。
en: Unless you apologize, I will not forgive you.

zh: 当他到达时，会议已经开始了。
en: When he arrived, the meeting had already started.

zh: 在她离开之前，她关掉了所有的灯。
en: Before she left, she turned off all the lights.

zh: 他一到家就打电话给我。
en: As soon as he got home, he called me.

zh: 她等到他回来才吃饭。
en: She waited until he came back to eat.

zh: 自从她搬来以后，我们成了好朋友。
en: Since she moved here, we have become good friends.

zh: 他学习很努力，以便通过考试。
en: He studied hard so that he could pass the exam.

zh: 她早点出发，以免迟到。
en: She left early in order not to be late.

zh: 这本书太难了，我看不懂。
en: The book is so difficult that I cannot understand it.

zh: 她是如此聪明，以至于所有人都喜欢她。
en: She is such a clever girl that everyone likes her.

zh: 他跑得那么快，以至于没有人能追上他。
en: He ran so fast that nobody could catch him.
